name: BEN_BILL_CHARGE_PAYMENTS
description: BEN_BILL_CHARGE_PAYMENTS table is a resolution table between payment to charges, which  is many to many relationship.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_PAYMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the  Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CHARGES.

columns.Name: BILL_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill number which flows from BEN_BILL_CHARGES.

columns.Name: BILL_PERIOD
columns.Comments: This column indicates the billing period which flows from BEN_BILL_CALENDER.

columns.Name: BILL_YEAR
columns.Comments: This column indicates the year of bill generation which flows from BEN_BILL_CALENDER.

columns.Name: PER_CREDIT_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_PER_CREDIT.

columns.Name: BILL_CAL_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CALENDER.

columns.Name: BILL_PAYMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_PAYMENTS.

columns.Name: AMT_PAID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Amt Paid.

columns.Name: AMT_DUE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Amt Due.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_DTL_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CHARGE_DETAILS.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
